summary: Tested SwarmSim multi-agent architecture refactoring with 6 specialist agents (Intel, Graph, Persona, SimDirector, Critic, Report) coordinated by Orchestrator. All core features working correctly: live-intel pipeline (202 + polling), agent generation with diversity check, simulation with round narratives, report generation with quality_score from Critic. Frontend mode toggle and quality badge verified.
passed_tests: POST /api/sessions/{id}/fetch-live returns 202 immediately (background task via orchestrator)
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status shows progress_step, progress_total, and progress message during fetching
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status returns completed status with graph (18 entities, 28 relationships) and intel_brief
Orchestrator runs Intel Agent -> Critic bias check -> Graph Agent pipeline (verified via backend logs)
POST /api/sessions/{id}/generate-agents returns 202 and orchestrator runs Persona Agent + diversity check
GET /api/sessions/{id}/agent-status returns completed agents with all 4 required personality types (Skeptic, Expert, Contrarian, Activist)
Diversity score calculated correctly (0.991 observed in logs)
POST /api/sessions/{id}/simulate runs simulation via SimDirector with round tracking
GET /api/sessions/{id}/simulation-status works during simulation (shows current_round, total_rounds, post_count)
Simulation completes with 25 posts over 3 rounds
POST /api/sessions/{id}/generate-report returns report with quality_score from Critic agent (score=4, overconfident=false)
Report includes quality_feedback from Critic evaluation
Frontend mode toggle (Document Upload vs Live Intelligence) works correctly
Frontend Live Intelligence mode shows topic input, prediction horizon selector, and Fetch & Analyze button
Frontend Document Upload mode shows file drop zone and prediction question input
Frontend has quality-score-badge with data-testid for testing
Document Upload mode regression: default data_mode is 'upload'
Document Upload mode regression: upload endpoint exists and validates file requirement
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-agent architecture is well-structured with clear separation of concerns
Orchestrator properly coordinates all 6 agents with logging at each step
Critic agent provides valuable quality checks: bias scoring for briefs, diversity scoring for agents, quality scoring for reports
SimDirector includes herd detection and contrarian event injection for more realistic simulations
Round narratives provide good context for simulation progression
test_credentials: No auth required. Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from backend .env.
seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-agent architecture fully tested. Key timings: live-fetch takes 40-60s (8 web searches + market data + Claude calls), agent generation takes 30-40s, simulation takes 2-4 min for 5 rounds, report generation takes 20-30s. Orchestrator logs each step with [Orchestrator] prefix. All 6 specialist agents (Intel, Graph, Persona, SimDirector, Critic, Report) working correctly. Quality badge shows on report step with data-testid='quality-score-badge'.
